items.claim: Tommy has had a good training camp and has been performing well in sparring.
items.quote: he's had a good camp. He's still I mean, we're still... still in it, but he's had a good camp. He's been looking [__] good in sparring.

items.claim: Tommy is a difficult fighter to deal with because of his movement.
items.quote: he's just a [__] to deal with, bro. Anybody that fights him is just going to have they're going to have to just... literally How do you beat him? You have to just kill him, bro. [snorts] Just make him not move, bro. Like, otherwise, if he can still move, you're [__]

items.claim: Alberto Montes possesses high-level striking skills.
Alberto Montes is highly proficient in front headlock positions.
Alberto Montes has a professional record of 12 wins and 1 loss, with 11 of those wins coming by way of submission.
items.quote: he's 12 and one and I think 11 of his wins were submissions.

items.claim: Alberto Montes has only recorded one knockout victory in his professional career.
items.quote: Bro, he only has one knockout, though. One knockout in his whole career.

items.claim: Tommy is highly resistant to being submitted.
items.quote: you can't sub Tommy. Really? I mean, if we we saw that was that was very difficult.
